name: victus-ai
description: Victus AI — Dual-pathway NCD risk prediction and TOI biomarker platform for LMIC clinical settings.

scripts.api:dev: cd apps/api && uv run uvicorn victus_api.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload
scripts.api:migrate: cd apps/api && uv run alembic upgrade head
scripts.api:revision: cd apps/api && uv run alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.test:api: cd apps/api && uv run --extra dev --extra ml pytest
scripts.test:e2e: cd apps/api && uv run --extra dev --extra ml pytest -m integration
